## Checklist

- [ ] No placeholder implementations, no TODO comments standing in for functionality
- [ ] ShellCheck clean (`tests/run.sh` passes) — and `ruff`/`mypy` clean for any Python
- [ ] `PROJECT_SPEC.md` updated if this changes spec'd behavior
- [ ] Relevant doc updated (`ARCHITECTURE.md` / `MIGRATION.md` / `SECURITY.md` / `TROUBLESHOOTING.md`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added
- [ ] No secret, credential, or default password introduced (diff checked)
- [ ] New/changed steps are idempotent and safe to re-run
- [ ] Tested against a real Ubuntu 24.04 VPS (or explain why not applicable)
